items.headline: The Association – Post Up – 4/28/2026
items.description: Recap all the Playoff action around the NBA from April 28, 2026 on The Association: Post Up.

items.headline: Game Recap: Spurs 114, Trail Blazers 95
items.description: The San Antonio Spurs defeated the Portland Trail Blazers, 114-95, to win the best-of-seven series, 4-1.

items.headline: Wemby, Fox close out Blazers in Game 5
items.description: Victor Wembanyama (17 points, 14 rebounds, six blocks) and De'Aaron Fox (21 points, nine assists) close out the Blazers in Game 5.
